title: T-046 — Location deactivate guard service
prompt:
# T-046 — Location deactivate guard

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §14.6 (FR-WH-041), V-WH-DASH-002.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`deactivateLocation(locationId)` Server Action that blocks deactivation when ≥1 active LP (status IN available/reserved) is present.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/location-deactivate.ts`. Count active LPs at the location. If >0 return V-WH-DASH-002 error 'cannot_deactivate_location_with_active_lps' (count, location_path) — UI surfaces explicit message. Otherwise set locations.active=false, append audit row, emit outbox 'location.deactivated' (deferred T-047).

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/location-deactivate.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/location-deactivate.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a location with 3 active LPs, when deactivateLocation runs, then it returns V-WH-DASH-002 with count=3 and the row stays active=true.
2. Given a location with 0 active LPs, when run, then locations.active=false and audit row exists.
3. Given Operator caller, when run, then RBAC error returns (Admin only per §14.6).

## Test strategy
- RED: location-deactivate.test.ts covers blocked, allowed, RBAC.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test location-deactivate`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not count consumed/shipped/blocked LPs as active.
- Do not bypass Admin RBAC.
- Do not skip audit row.

pipeline_inputs.description: Block location deactivation when active LPs exist; Admin-only.
pipeline_inputs.details: Active = status IN ('available','reserved'). Audit row + outbox emission deferred T-047.
acceptance_criteria: Given a location with 3 active LPs, when run, then V-WH-DASH-002 returns with count=3 and active stays true
Given a location with 0 active LPs, when run, then active=false and audit row exists
Given Operator caller, when run, then RBAC error returns
test_strategy: RED: location-deactivate.test.ts covers blocked, allowed, RBAC
